concerns.text: Missing task for FR-003/US-2 UniFrac metrics. Spec FR-003 and US-2 explicitly require calculating 'UniFrac (weighted, unweighted)' beta diversity. Tasks T016 and T021 only mention 'Bray-Curtis' and 'UniFrac' is absent from the implementation steps. The plan also omits UniFrac in Phase 1 Task 1.6.

Missing task for FR-004/US-2 partial Spearman correlation on taxa. Spec FR-004 and US-2 require 'partial Spearman correlation analysis between diversity metrics/taxa abundance'. Task T020 covers diversity, and T020a covers 'MaAsLin2-style linear modeling', but no task implements the specific 'partial Spearman' correlation for taxa abundance required by the spec.

Missing task for FR-004/US-2 GAD-7 correlation. Spec FR-004 and US-2 require correlation analysis with 'PHQ-9, GAD-7'. Task T020 mentions 'PHQ-9/GAD-7', but T020a (taxa modeling) and T021 (PERMANOVA) only reference 'PHQ-9'. There is no explicit task to perform the GAD-7 specific correlation or modeling for taxa, risking incomplete coverage of the requirement.

Missing task for SC-003 validation metric calculation. Spec SC-003 requires measuring 'consistency of effect direction... against a threshold of >= 80%'. Task T032 mentions computing '% match' but does not explicitly include a task to compare this against the 80% threshold and report the pass/fail status as required by the success criterion.

Stale/Incorrect tag usage. Task T023 is tagged 'SC-005 Check' but implements a logic check (delta > 0.01) that contradicts the spec's SC-005 which requires reporting if 'at least one taxon shows a p-value change > 0.01'. The task logic treats it as a binary fail if none found, whereas the spec implies reporting the finding (or lack thereof) as a result. This is a coverage mismatch in the task description vs spec intent.
